reviews.comment:
Gran cantidad de surtidores y siempre funcionan las mangueras de aire. Esta semana cargué y por mal funcionamiento de YPF Serviclub se debitó 2 veces el importe. Volví y al instante solucionaron el percance

(Translated by Google)
Plenty of pumps and the air hoses always work. This week I filled up and due to a malfunction at YPF Serviclub, the amount was debited twice. I went back and they resolved the issue immediately.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDb0wyNTZ3RRAB
